title: Villager Industries
description: Villager become useful by making them work for you
body:
Start building your own village. The catch? The villager actually work for you and produce items. You can build houses like you want and just have to give them a use by selecting the right door.

Features:

Villagesystem with diffrent Structures to build (Townhall, Bedroom, Smithy, Mineshaft, Storage, Kitchen, Guardpost, Rancherpen, Butchery, Library)
Villagerprofessions (Farmer, Lumberjack, Miner, Druid, Blacksmith, Guard, Chef, Rancher, Butcher)
Working Villagers
Professionsystem with levels

Planed Features:

All the missing Professions from Tektopia 
All the missing Structures from Tektopia
Vanilla Villages are now Villageindustries Villages
Villagers follow recipes which are tweaked (like from Crafttweaker)
Maybe Professions for other mods like Mechanism

[Discrod Server](https://discord.gg/jAUbrsKMHh)
[Wiki](https://github.com/Poseidonianer/Villager-Industries/wiki)


Feedback and Bugreports are more than welcome.

The code was completly written by myself.

The GUI Texture was from King of Cameras
The Custom Model was made by FlyGuy
The Animation was made by SwagPotato345

Huge Thanks to all 3 for helping developing the mod

The main inspiration was the 1.12.2 Tektopia mod from Tangotek.
